title: Localive Dev Server Target
description: Extended Angular CLI dev server with Localive live i18n editing support.

buildTarget.description: A build builder target to serve in the format of `project:target[:configuration]`. You can also pass in more than one configuration name as a comma-separated list. Example: `project:target:production,staging`.

sslKey.description: SSL key to use for serving HTTPS.

sslCert.description: SSL certificate to use for serving HTTPS.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to be added to all responses.

open.description: Opens the url in default browser.

verbose.description: Adds more details to output logging.

liveReload.description: Whether to reload the page on change, using live-reload.

publicHost.description: The URL that the browser client should use to connect to the development server.

allowedHosts.description: List of hosts that are allowed to access the dev server.

servePath.description: The pathname where the application will be served.

disableHostCheck.description: Don't verify connected clients are part of allowed hosts.

poll.description: Enable and define the file watching poll time period in milliseconds.

forceEsbuild.description: Force the development server to use the 'browser-esbuild' builder when building.

prebundle.description: Enable and control the Vite-based development server's prebundling capabilities.

exclude.description: List of package imports that should not be prebundled by the development server.

translationsPath.description: Root directory for translation JSON files.

searchRoots.description: Additional directories to scan for translation files.

defaultLocale.description: Default/source locale. Defaults to the first entry in locales.

endpoint.description: API endpoint path for translation updates. Defaults to '/__localive-update'.

wsPort.description: WebSocket port for multi-tab sync (auto if omitted).
